notes: External sources may be used for law retrieval, query expansion, dispute taxonomy, or prompt context.
Do not train or tune on external labeled legal QA, legal entailment, or outcome-labeled case datasets.
Keep external resources separate from official public/private competition inputs.

sources.name: Cơ sở dữ liệu Quốc gia về Văn bản quy phạm pháp luật
sources.license_or_terms_note: Official public legal document portal. Check site terms before bulk crawling; use only raw legal text/metadata, not labels.
sources.intended_use: law retrieval corpus enrichment, law title mapping, query expansion, and legal-domain terminology normalization

sources.name: Công báo điện tử Nước CHXHCN Việt Nam
sources.license_or_terms_note: Official gazette portal. Check site terms before bulk crawling; use only official raw legal documents and metadata.
sources.intended_use: raw official legal text, document metadata, and updated legal provision context for retrieval

sources.name: Cổng thông tin điện tử pháp điển
sources.license_or_terms_note: Official legal codification/reference portal. Check site terms before bulk crawling; use only non-annotated reference text.
sources.intended_use: dispute taxonomy, legal topic grouping, query expansion, and prompt context for legal-domain terminology
